title: Polish, external-both merge, final verify
goal: external-both merges findings for triage; L5 conditionals where needed; full suite green; plan ready to archive criteria met.

tasks.title: external-both findings merge
tasks.description: Implement sequential Codex then Grok envelope on the same cleaned artifact; merge key file:line plus normalized claim; severity conflict keeps higher severity with dual provenance; partial provider failure keeps the other side and surfaces error; unit tests for merge helper; document in KB.
scopeBoundary: do not auto-apply fixes without human triage
acceptance: external-both documented in review-code and review-plan with merge key severity and partial-failure rules; merge unit tests pass; validate-skills passes

verifier.command: npm run validate-skills && grep -q 'external-both' skills/core/review-code.md && grep -q 'external-both' skills/core/review-plan.md && node --test tests/external-both-merge.test.js

tasks.title: ide.grok conditionals on hot skills
tasks.description: Add minimal ide.grok guidance in implement, parallel-dispatch, and project-related assets only where spawn_subagent or ask_user_question behavior differs.
scopeBoundary: do not invent new agent types unless a failing task requires them
acceptance: rendered grok output includes any new conditionals; validate-skills passes

tasks.title: Final verification suite
tasks.description: Run config, install, round-trip, render, project suites and validate-skills; record results in plan Reviews section.
scopeBoundary: no new features; fix only regressions found by the suite

exitGates.description: external-both merge contract documented in review-code and review-plan; validate-skills passes.

verifier.command: npm run validate-skills && grep -q 'external-both' skills/core/review-code.md && grep -q 'external-both' skills/core/review-plan.md

exitGates.description: Final regression includes config install round-trip render project and validate-skills.

verifier.command: node --test tests/config.test.js tests/install.test.js tests/install-uninstall-roundtrip.test.js tests/render.test.js tests/project.test.js && npm run validate-skills

exitGates.description: external-both merge helper unit tests pass.
